title: Automated Timezone Specific Calendared Events
excerpt:

posts.author: jt5280 (John Tice)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are a law firm that specializes in Immigration and Bankruptcy matters.

We use Monday to track our cases and would love the ability to add our scheduled phone calls with the various courts to our Outlook Calendar. Because we work in multiple states, we need timezone functionality to adjust for the time changes between where we’re calling from (the individual attorney’s calendar timezone) and where the call is being answered (court location timezone).

Once the date, time and timezone (specific to the court) are entered in Monday, the ability to create an automation or integration that would allow for a button click to place the event in the Outlook Calendar would be great.

image3966×532 204 KB

posts.author: denise.furtado (Denise)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am also trying to setup reminders specific to each employee timezone but I can only setup in a general timezone - which I am not even sure which one it is.

Is there a way we can setup different times to send out reminders? It would be great to have one.
